message:
feat(tests): expand asupersync contract matrix and RGC planning track enrichment tests

Add ~345 lines of enrichment tests to asupersync_contract_matrix covering
enum introspection (AsupersyncSurface::all()), as_str round-trips,
CompatibilityDisposition variants, ContractFailureCode catalog validation,
schema version constants, serde roundtrips, BTreeSet ordering, clone
independence, JSON field-name stability, and deterministic bundle hash
verification.

Add ~250 lines of enrichment tests to rgc_planning_track covering schema
version constant prefixes, deterministic report hash generation, bead ID
propagation into sub-artifacts, scope contract field completeness,
milestone evidence link validation, gatebook milestone ordering, risk
acceptance ledger entries, wave handoff matrix structure, bundle writer
artifact existence, event schema round-trip, and operator verification
commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
